flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at College of Alameda rose 71% between 2007 and 2010 ($2.6k → $4.5k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at College of Alameda fell 62% between 2009 and 2010 (6.9% → 2.6%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at College of Alameda fell 33% between 2007 and 2010 (23.5% → 15.8%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at College of Alameda rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.7k → $9.9k).
